archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Data Clarity

guidelines: Headings NEVER use Inter. Outfit provides a modern startup tech feel.
Never center paragraphs. Left-align text for readability, center-align headings only for structural impact.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: Jump between H1 and subtitle must be at least 2 Tailwind steps (e.g., text-6xl down to text-xl).
Use Dark Mode for Hero, Marketing Sections, and AI Chat Counselor to feel immersive and cutting-edge.
Use Light Mode for Dashboard Tables, Admin Panel, and dense data sections for absolute clarity (Archetype 4).
Never use pure black or white. Always tint greys with slate.
CTAs must use the primary brand blue or the AI gradient with white text to maintain high contrast.

marketing_grid.name: Tetris Grid
marketing_grid.description: Asymmetrical layout for AI Features. Avoid boring equal squares.

glassmorphism.marketing_cards: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] rounded-2xl
glassmorphism.rule: Glassmorphism in dark mode must include a 1px border-white/10 to ground it. Never just blur.

dashboard_cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
dashboard_cards.rule: Flat, solid backgrounds for clinical data precision.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3
buttons.rule: All buttons must have a subtle hover lift (-translate-y-0.5) and focus rings for accessibility.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard geometric consistency. Use 1.5px stroke width.

images.description: AI-generated abstract 3D spheres floating in deep navy blue and vibrant purple studio lighting. Place in hero section background with opacity-40 and blend-screen.
Modern Indian university campus for trust metrics or background of 'Top Colleges' section.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set hover text colors and background changes (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion for entrance staggers. Spring transitions for hover states (stiffness: 400, damping: 30).
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the university logos. Low contrast (grayscale with 0.5 opacity) transitioning to full color on hover.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use placeholder image links (via.placeholder.com). Use ONLY the provided URLs in this JSON.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for the landing page for layout freedom. Use Shadcn components heavily customized for the Dashboard.
Implement the 'Hynexs Edu Counseller' brand name in the Nav bar using Outfit font, font-bold, text-xl.
Hero section buttons: One for 'TS EAPCET Predictor' (Primary), One for 'JoSAA Predictor' (Secondary Glass).
The Hero Section should use the 'hero_background' AI image, absolutely positioned behind the content with a dark overlay (bg-slate-950/70) so text is highly readable.
Use Lenis for smooth scrolling if possible, otherwise rely on smooth CSS scroll-behavior.
